'''hozataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glabellar|glabellar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glabellar|glabellar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hozataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hozatithi|hozatithi]] || [[word:hozatiji|hozatiji]] || [[word:hozatishi|hozatishi]] || [[word:hozatiki|hozatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hozatuthuthu|hozatuthuthu]] || [[word:hozatujuju|hozatujuju]] || [[word:hozatushushu|hozatushushu]] || [[word:hozatukuku|hozatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hozatuthu|hozatuthu]] || [[word:hozatuju|hozatuju]] || [[word:hozatushu|hozatushu]] || [[word:hozatuku|hozatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hozatufthuf|hozatufthuf]] || [[word:hozatufjuf|hozatufjuf]] || [[word:hozatufshuf|hozatufshuf]] || [[word:hozatufkuf|hozatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hozatethe|hozatethe]] || [[word:hozateje|hozateje]] || [[word:hozateshe|hozateshe]] || [[word:hozateke|hozateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hozatothotho|hozatothotho]] || [[word:hozatojojo|hozatojojo]] || [[word:hozatoshosho|hozatoshosho]] || [[word:hozatokoko|hozatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hozatotho|hozatotho]] || [[word:hozatojo|hozatojo]] || [[word:hozatosho|hozatosho]] || [[word:hozatoko|hozatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hozatofthof|hozatofthof]] || [[word:hozatofjof|hozatofjof]] || [[word:hozatofshof|hozatofshof]] || [[word:hozatofkof|hozatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfthÃŸf|hozatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfjÃŸf|hozatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfshÃŸf|hozatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfkÃŸf|hozatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hozatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hozatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hozatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hozatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfthÃŸf|hozatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfjÃŸf|hozatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfshÃŸf|hozatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfkÃŸf|hozatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfthÃŸf|hozatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfjÃŸf|hozatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfshÃŸf|hozatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hozatÃŸfkÃŸf|hozatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hozatÃḊthÃḊ|hozatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hozatÃḊjÃḊ|hozatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hozatÃḊshÃḊ|hozatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hozatÃḊkÃḊ|hozatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hozatathatha|hozatathatha]] || [[word:hozatajaja|hozatajaja]] || [[word:hozatashasha|hozatashasha]] || [[word:hozatakaka|hozatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hozatatha|hozatatha]] || [[word:hozataja|hozataja]] || [[word:hozatasha|hozatasha]] || [[word:hozataka|hozataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hozatafthaf|hozatafthaf]] || [[word:hozatafjaf|hozatafjaf]] || [[word:hozatafshaf|hozatafshaf]] || [[word:hozatafkaf|hozatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hozatasha|hozatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hozatshÃḋsha|hozatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hozatrosha|hozatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hozatmusha|hozatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hozatyasha|hozatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohozatnkshÃḋsha|gohozatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohozatnkrosha|gohozatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohozatnkmusha|gohozatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohozatnkyasha|gohozatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hozazatasha|hozazatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hozazatshÃḋsha|hozazatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hozazatrosha|hozazatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hozazatmusha|hozazatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hozazatyasha|hozazatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohozazatnkshÃḋsha|gohozazatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohozazatnkrosha|gohozazatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohozazatnkmusha|gohozazatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohozazatnkyasha|gohozazatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hezÃḊtasha|hezÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hezÃḊtshÃḋsha|hezÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hezÃḊtrosha|hezÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hezÃḊtmusha|hezÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hezÃḊtyasha|hezÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohezÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gohezÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohezÃḊtnkrosha|gohezÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohezÃḊtnkmusha|gohezÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohezÃḊtnkyasha|gohezÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hozfatasha|hozfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hozfatshÃḋsha|hozfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hozfatrosha|hozfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hozfatmusha|hozfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hozfatyasha|hozfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohozfatnkshÃḋsha|gohozfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohozfatnkrosha|gohozfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohozfatnkmusha|gohozfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohozfatnkyasha|gohozfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
